business.name: Landscape SEO
business.oneLineDescription: Helping 250+ landscapers break seven figures and beyond — profitably.

hero.imageAlt: Portrait of the Landscape SEO founder / a landscaper reviewing growth on a laptop
hero.headline: Break seven figures. Profitably.
hero.subhead: The Green Dream helps landscapers sell more, raise margins, and grow past seven figures — without adding more hours.
points: Higher-margin jobs, not just more work

audience.customerDescription: For landscaping business owners who are great at the work but stuck under a ceiling — ready to sell more, raise prices with confidence, and build a business that runs without them.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.description: We audit your sales, pricing, and marketing to find the fastest wins hiding in your business.

steps.title: Position
steps.description: Reposition so you win better jobs at higher prices — and stop competing on price.

steps.title: Systemize
steps.description: Install the sales and marketing systems that keep your pipeline full year-round.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: Grow past seven figures profitably — and get yourself out of the truck.

podcast.title: The Green Dream
podcast.blurb: The podcast for landscapers who want to sell more and build a seven-figure business — real tactics, real owners, no fluff.

episodes.title: How to raise your prices without losing jobs
episodes.blurb: The pricing mindset shift that protects your margins.

episodes.title: The sales process that closes premium work
episodes.blurb: A repeatable, no-pressure way to win better clients.

episodes.title: Marketing that fills your off-season
episodes.blurb: Where leads actually come from for landscapers.

testimonials.quote: We went from $420K to $1.3M in under two years — and I'm working fewer weekends. The systems are what changed everything.
testimonials.author: Marcus D.

testimonials.quote: Raised our prices 30% and still booked out the season. I stopped guessing and started running a real business.
testimonials.author: Renata S.

testimonials.quote: The Green Dream gave me the playbook I wish I'd had ten years ago. First seven-figure year, and it was profitable.
testimonials.author: Tyler B.

about.imageAlt: Portrait of the Landscape SEO founder
about.heading: We only work with landscapers
about.body: Landscape SEO (home of The Green Dream podcast) exists for one thing: helping landscaping business owners sell more and build seven-figure companies that don't depend on them. We've coached 250+ owners through pricing, sales, and marketing — and we bring what actually works in the trade, not generic business advice.
